global.container: w-full min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50 flex flex-col
global.navigation: h-14 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl flex items-center justify-between px-4 sm:px-6 z-50 sticky top-0

start_screen.wrapper: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 sm:p-12 md:p-24
start_screen.hero_content: max-w-3xl w-full flex flex-col items-center space-y-12
start_screen.prompt_box_container: w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden focus-within:border-zinc-600 transition-colors duration-300
start_screen.prompt_box_input: w-full min-h-[160px] bg-transparent p-6 text-xl placeholder:text-zinc-600 resize-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-0
start_screen.prompt_box_footer: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-t border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50

workspace_mode.wrapper: flex-1 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)] overflow-hidden
workspace_mode.left_sidebar: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col h-full
workspace_mode.agent_timeline: p-4 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/30 flex flex-col gap-2
workspace_mode.right_panel: col-span-1 md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-9 bg-zinc-900/50 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden relative
workspace_mode.preview_header: h-12 border-b border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-between px-4 bg-zinc-950/50
workspace_mode.preview_content: flex-1 overflow-auto bg-zinc-900 relative rounded-sm m-2 border border-zinc-800/50
workspace_mode.log_console: h-64 border-t border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 p-4 font-['JetBrains_Mono'] text-xs overflow-y-auto

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 border border-zinc-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:border-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

cards.glass: bg-zinc-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-zinc-800/50 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-xl

agent_status_pill.wrapper: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-sm

chat_bubble.user: bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 p-4 rounded-xl rounded-tr-sm max-w-[85%] self-end

tabs.list: flex items-center gap-1 border-b border-zinc-800 w-full px-2
tabs.trigger: px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-white data-[state=active]:text-white transition-all

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have visible hover states altering background-color or text-color.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Inputs and buttons MUST show focus rings (ring-1 ring-zinc-500 or ring-white).
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion default: { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 10 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, transition: { duration: 0.3 } }
interactions_and_motion.chat_stagger: List items in chat should stagger entrance.
interactions_and_motion.agent_timeline_animation: Active step in timeline should pulse gently or have a subtle moving gradient border (Tracing Beam concept).

icons_strategy.style: Use regular weight, stroke-width 1.5. Sizes typically 16px (w-4 h-4) to 20px (w-5 h-5).

testing_attributes.rule: MUST add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.

media_assets.logo_placeholder:
Use a stylized text logo:
F
ForgePilot

abstract_dark_bg.description: Subtle dark abstract texture, can be used as a very low opacity (5%) background image behind the start screen prompt to kill the solid flat black.

implementation_instructions_for_main_age: 1. Setup Tailwind config with the specified colors (zinc-950, zinc-900, etc) and fonts (IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono).

2. Build the Start Screen: A centralized, large text area that mimics an AI command prompt. It should dominate the viewport, featuring a subtle glowing outline on focus. Wrap it in a container with the abstract dark bg at 5-10% opacity.
3. Build the Workspace Layout: A strict 2-column grid. Left side (chat + active agent timeline). Right side (Code/Preview + Logs).

4. Agent Timeline: Crucial feature. Show a vertical or horizontal list of agents (Orchestrator -> Planner -> Coder -> Reviewer -> Test -> Git). Highlight the active one with a glowing pulse indicator.
5. Live Preview Panel: Needs to look like an embedded browser or sandbox. Include a mock URL bar and a refresh button.
6. Log & Debugger View: A terminal-like bottom pane on the right side. Use JetBrains Mono font, text-xs. Color-code errors (rose-400), warnings (amber-400), info (zinc-400).
7. GitHub Import/Export: Triggered via a Dialog. Keep the modal minimal and high contrast.
8. DO NOT use generic borders. Stick to the 1px `border-zinc-800` to maintain the Swiss Brutalist/Developer Tool aesthetic. Ensure padding is generous (`p-6` or `p-8`) inside containers.
